title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
summary_full: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.
summary_public: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.
